text: Hi Daryl. So I checked out, I looked into that thing, the product that you sent me and I understand the problem here. For example you see the word store after the brand name here you don't. And I also this is the right way. They always add the word store after the brand name if it is correctly linked to the brand for this product. Or maybe there are many more products where you don't see the word store. It's not correctly linked to the brand although the brand name is accurate. So the solution here is to gather all these products, reach out to Amazon and ask them to link it to the brand. That is the step. Now I don't know how many products you have but this is a simple step. You can choose to do it yourself. I mean not yourself, I mean your team have your team do it or if you need my help let me know. Thank you.
